0.1.0-alpha

Usage: es-quickdump [options] [command]

Options:
  --version   Show version information
  -h|--host   ES Host to connect to. Default: http://127.0.0.1:9200/
  -p|--proxy  HTTP proxy to use for ES connections
  -?|--help   Show help information

Commands:
  dump        Dump ES documents to a file

Run 'es-quickdump [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
0.1.0-alpha

Usage: es-quickdump [options] [command]

Options:
  --version   Show version information
  -h|--host   ES Host to connect to. Default: http://127.0.0.1:9200/
  -p|--proxy  HTTP proxy to use for ES connections
  -?|--help   Show help information

Commands:
  dump        Dump ES documents to a file

Run 'es-quickdump [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Dump ES documents to a file

Usage: es-quickdump dump [options] <OutputFile> <IndexPatterns>

Arguments:
  OutputFile          
  IndexPatterns       

Options:
  --help              Show help information
  --size              Documents per request
  -s|--state-file     State file to use. Default: {Output}.state
  --parallelism       Max number of parallel requests, default: 6
  -f|--filter         Filter to apply. This is a query string query
  -n|--include-id     Includes the ID of documents. If set, the document data
                      moves to 'doc'
  -m|--include-index  Includes the Index of documents. If set, the document data
                      moves to 'doc'

commands.payload:
Dump ES documents to a file

Usage: es-quickdump dump [options] <OutputFile> <IndexPatterns>

Arguments:
  OutputFile          
  IndexPatterns       

Options:
  --help              Show help information
  --size              Documents per request
  -s|--state-file     State file to use. Default: {Output}.state
  --parallelism       Max number of parallel requests, default: 6
  -f|--filter         Filter to apply. This is a query string query
  -n|--include-id     Includes the ID of documents. If set, the document data
                      moves to 'doc'
  -m|--include-index  Includes the Index of documents. If set, the document data
                      moves to 'doc'

staticCommands.description: Dump ES documents to a file

options.description: Filter to apply. This is a query string query
Includes the ID of documents. If set, the document data moves to 'doc'
Includes the Index of documents. If set, the document data moves to 'doc'
Max number of parallel requests, default: 6
ES Host to connect to. Default: http://127.0.0.1:9200/
HTTP proxy to use for ES connections
